group.value: Group J — opponents Algeria, Austria, Jordan

manager.value: Lionel Scaloni (since 2018; led Argentina to 2021 Copa América, 2022 World Cup, 2024 Copa América)

qualification.value: Qualified via CONMEBOL qualifiers; defending champions returning

recent_form.value: Reigning Copa América champions (won 2024, retaining the 2021 title); kept 17 players from the Qatar 2022 winning side — continuity selection

wc_role.value: Defending champions (won 2022); aiming to become the first nation since Brazil in 1962 to retain the World Cup

key_players.value: Lionel Messi (captain, record 6th World Cup at 38), Lautaro Martínez, Julián Álvarez, Emiliano Martínez (GK), Alexis Mac Allister, Enzo Fernández, Cristian Romero, Rodrigo De Paul

squad_news.value: Scaloni named a 26-man squad on 26 May 2026; Messi (38) selected for a record 6th World Cup — a record no male outfield player has matched. Squad blends 2022 winners with newcomers (Nico Paz, Franco Mastantuono-era youth).
